desc: Rotates each moving element about its start point so its direction vector matches the reference element's direction.
summary: Rotates each moving element about its start point so its direction vector matches the reference element's direction. Planar cases rotate about Z (safer for hosted families).
usecase: Align a pipe / duct / tray to match a reference direction.
notfor: Intersection-point-based slope alignment (use MatchSlopeIntersection). Height-only alignment.
precondition: Active document. 1 reference + ≥1 mover resolved. Both have recoverable directions.
postcondition: Each mover rotated in place so |dir − refDir| ≈ 0.
logictree: 1) Resolve reference + movers. 2) Extract reference direction. 3) Transaction: per mover compute rotation about Z (or full 3D if Z component ≠ 0) and call RotateElement. 4) Commit, log. 5) Failure → WireFault + rollback.
